option.value: {"type":"RUN_ERROR","timestamp":1784096898,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019f64763b657083beb659e839bee9b1","conversation_id":"019f5a9c961d76d796bb61d9082659e4","tip_option":{"type":"markdown","level":"error","content":"你本月模型Token额度已用尽，可前往 [Token看板](https://tokens.woa.com/?product=codebuddy) 查看使用详情，或者参考 [提额说明](https://iwiki.woa.com/p/4018934302) 申请提额~"}},"message":"你本月模型Token额度已用尽，可前往 [Token看板](https://tokens.woa.com/?product=codebuddy) 查看使用详情，或者参考 [提额说明](https://iwiki.woa.com/p/4018934302) 申请提额~"}

entry.value:
module seckill
go 1.25.0
require ( github.com/gin-gonic/gin v1.9.1 github.com/redis/go-redis/v9 v9.3.0 gopkg.in/yaml.v3 v3.0.1 )

option.name: question
option.value: 为什么我每次tl nlw grwb 都会更新tlozmt版本标签
